description_long: This office building features a modern, angular design with a green rooftop and extensive use of glass and concrete. The structure is composed of two main stories with a partial third level, and includes large, floor-to-ceiling windows on the front and side facades. The building sits on a landscaped plot with geometric paving patterns and integrated green spaces, including a sloped lawn and planters. The roof is partially covered with solar panels and has a stepped, accessible terrace area. The main entrance is recessed and sheltered, with a prominent overhang and a wide staircase leading up from the street. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with a mix of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern office building with a green rooftop, large glass windows, and geometric landscaping, featuring a stepped terrace and prominent entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide staircase, and extensive glass facade with a green rooftop and terrace.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid end wall, vertical window slits, and landscaped side yard with geometric paving.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the secondary entrance, more uniform window arrangement, and the continuation of the green rooftop.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the textured concrete wall, minimal windows, and the edge of the rooftop terrace.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, large rectangular windows with some vertical slits; floor-to-ceiling glass on main facades, more solid walls on sides.
